subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, the Desire of the World, a praise which is immeasurably above the understanding of all that dwell on earth
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از عرفان اهل امکان مقصود عالمیان را لایق و سزاست که بلا را مخصوص
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for protection, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
